name: Ownfoil
short_desc: Self-hosted Tinfoil/CyberFoil shop for your Switch library (NSP/NSZ/XCI/XCZ).
author: a1ex4
description: Ownfoil turns your Nintendo Switch game library into a self-hosted, customizable Tinfoil shop. Compatible with Tinfoil, CyberFoil and Sphaira. Serves NSP/NSZ/XCI/XCZ, auto-scans the library, generates the index, and supports private multi-user authentication. Upload your console keys to identify titles by content.
